project_type: Next.js 16.2.4 App Router music discovery platform with React 19, Tailwind CSS 4, TypeScript 5
build_system: bun (bun install, bun run build, bun run lint). Note: npm is NOT available on this machine, use bun for all commands.
test_framework: No test framework configured. No test scripts in package.json.
verification_instructions: 1. Run 'bun run lint' - must pass with 0 errors. 2. Run 'bun run build' - must compile and generate pages successfully.
environment_constraints: OPEN_INTERNET mode - full network access. npm is NOT available, must use 'bun' for all package management and scripts. Must run 'mise trust' before first bun command.
contribution_requirements: From steering: Zero TypeScript errors, zero lint errors, successful build, responsive Tailwind layouts, semantic HTML, accessibility (ARIA labels, keyboard nav), no console.log in production, Server Components preferred unless client behavior needed.
key_patterns: - Components in app/components/ as Client Components ('use client') or Server Components. - CSS design system in app/globals.css with CSS variables for light/dark themes mapped to Tailwind via @theme inline. - Glass utility classes (.glass, .glass-elevated, .glass-card, .glass-player, etc.) with backdrop-filter. - Premium transitions via .transition-premium class. - Dynamic color extraction from artwork applied as CSS custom properties. - Inline SVGs used throughout (NO lucide-react). - Geist and Geist_Mono fonts loaded via next/font/google. - Pages use Server Components with Suspense boundaries for async data. - Layout wraps ThemeProvider > SettingsProvider > AudioPlayerProvider > DynamicColorProvider > FavoritesProvider > PersonalizationProvider.
directory_structure: app/ - Next.js App Router pages and components. app/components/ - 54+ UI components. app/api/ - API routes for lyrics, recommendations, spotify, youtube. lib/ - Service layer (itunes.ts, spotify.ts, lastfm.ts, youtube.ts, music-service.ts, etc.). types/ - TypeScript declarations. public/ - Static SVG assets.
